videos.title: 5 Apple Wallet Features You Didn't Know Existed And One That Needs Work!
videos.description:

Apple Wallet has quietly become one of the most important apps on the iPhone. What started as just Apple Pay has evolved into a hub for transit cards, Apple Cash, Tap to Pay, digital keys, saved credit card information, and so much more. In this video, I’m breaking down the Apple Wallet features I genuinely use every single day, why some of them feel futuristic, and a few things Apple still desperately needs to fix.

videos.title: iOS 26.5 - The Deep Dive!
videos.description:
Apple takes big steps in iOS 26.5, introducing end-to-end encryption for RCS, a feature that's still in beta but promises increased security for messaging. Jeff dives into other new updates, like the controversial upcoming ads in Apple Maps, improved subscription options for App Store apps, and advanced notifications controls for FaceTime calls from unknown numbers. Tune in to discover how these changes can enhance your iPhone experience and keep your data more secure!
